---
name: Database Driver Request
about: Request support for a new database driver or ORM
title: "[Driver]: "
labels: enhancement, driver
assignees: ""
---

## Database / ORM

What database or ORM do you want supported? (e.g., "CockroachDB", "MongoDB", "MikroORM")

## Clone Strategy

How should databases be copied for this driver? (e.g., dump/restore, file copy, native template)

## Connection String Format

What does the connection string look like?

```
driver://user:pass@host:port/dbname
```

## Caveats / Limitations

Any edge cases or known limitations?

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] Just requesting
